chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7029 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Heraing 1. For order on CMA No.7713/2023 (Rule-22). 2. For hearing of main case. 25-03-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondents. This petition is pending since 2019 without any progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
